bird.name: Large rock martin
bird.summary: The large rock martin (Ptyonoprogne fuligula), also known as the southern crag-martin, is a small passerine bird in the swallow family that…

relations.subject: Large rock martin
relations.evidence: | year=1997 | title=The Atlas of Southern African Birds | volume=2: Passerines | location=Johannesburg | publisher=BirdLife South Africa | isbn=978-0-620-20731-7 | pages=70-71 | chapter-url=https://sabap2.adu.org.za/docs/sabap1/529.pdf }} The natural breeding habitat is hilly or mountainous country with cliffs and escarpment ridges, often far from water
relations.object_summary: 大型猛禽和食腐鸟偏好的高崖栖息环境。
